message:
bd-3r75: add 201 unit tests for package_manager, autocomplete, session_index

Coverage improvements for three under-tested modules:
- package_manager.rs: 104 new tests (12→116) covering pattern matching,
  source parsing, settings I/O, resource resolution, dedup logic
- autocomplete.rs: 73 new tests (13→86) covering fuzzy matching, token
  parsing, path resolution, file refs, caching, sorting
- session_index.rs: 24 new tests (13→37) covering session stats, file
  stats, walk_sessions, delete, reindex, JSONL parsing
- Fix lifetime error in extensions.rs test_host_call_context (another agent)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
